message:
feat(install): wire signature verification into update flow (bd-oyk3)

Add fail-closed ECDSA P-256 signature verification to
RollbackManager::atomic_update. When a SignatureVerifier is configured,
the update rejects binaries with missing, corrupted, or invalid .sig
sidecars before any replacement occurs.

Changes:
- Add verifier field + with_verifier() builder to RollbackManager
- Add SignatureRejected variant to UpdateResult
- Verify new binary signature before atomic replacement
- Add 7 integration tests covering: missing .sig, wrong key, corrupted
  .sig, valid signature, no verifier, key rotation, accessor methods
- Add 3 unit tests for verifier accessors and result constructors
- Close process_triage-aii.26 (all 16 supervision property tests pass)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
